mapper.sql: SELECT (TOTALCNT-RNUM+1) AS PAGENUM , P.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , PAGING.* FROM (
mapper.select:
SELECT b.comm_grp_cd ,b.cd_nm label ,b.comm_cd value ,b.cd_val ,b.cd_expl FROM ad_comm_grp_cd a ,ad_comm_cd b WHERE 1=1 AND a.comm_grp_cd = b.comm_grp_cd AND a.use_yn != 'N' AND b.use_yn != 'N'
AND a.comm_grp_cd = UPPER(#{commGrpCd})
ORDER BY sort_odr

SELECT a.comm_grp_cd ,a.comm_cd ,a.cd_nm ,a.cd_val ,a.cd_expl ,a.use_yn ,a.sort_odr ,TO_CHAR(a.stm_fir_reg_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') stm_fir_reg_date ,a.stm_fir_reg_user_id ,(SELECT user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = a.stm_fir_reg_user_id) stm_fir_reg_user_nm ,TO_CHAR(a.stm_last_upd_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') stm_last_upd_date ,a.stm_last_upd_user_id ,(SELECT user_nm from ad_user_mst where user_id = a.stm_last_upd_user_id) stm_last_upd_user_nm FROM ad_comm_cd a ,ad_comm_grp_cd b WHERE 1=1 AND a.comm_grp_cd = b.comm_grp_cd
AND a.comm_grp_cd = UPPER(#{commGrpCd})
AND a.comm_cd = UPPER(#{commCd})
ORDER BY a.sort_odr asc

SELECT SUBSTR (SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH (COMM_CD , ';'), 2) FROM (SELECT COMM_CD||':'||CD_NM AS COMM_CD , ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY COMM_CD ) RN , COUNT (*) OVER () CNT FROM AD_COMM_CD WHERE COMM_GRP_CD = #{commGrpCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y') WHERE RN = CNT START WITH RN = 1 CONNECT BY RN = PRIOR RN + 1
